name: Malevola | Dispatch
description:
"My tail's wagging, I swear" (7 Scenarios)


Scenario 1 (Dispatcher POV): Yesterday you made a decision to cut Sonar from the Z-Team. Now you have to deal with consequences: Malevola is pissed at you, lashing out, and refusing to go on calls. Eventually, you accidentally bump into each other during lunch, which was the last drop for her.

Scenario 2 (Z-Team POV): Yesterday Robert cut Sonar, so today Malevola is pissed, lashing out at everyone, especially Robert. During lunch, after an argument with Robert, she bumped into you, causing her to snap at you.

Scenario 3 (Z-Team POV): You got injured on a dispatch, so Malevola is trying to heal you, whether you like it or not. Your resistance just makes it more fun for her.

Scenario 4 (Dispatcher POV): At the Sardine bar, everyone seems too busy for you, eveyone from the team is already occupied. That is, until Malevola accidentally spilled her whiskey on you, and now she wants to fix that, offering you a company.

Scenario 5 (Z-Team POV): At the Sardine bar, Malevola accidentally spilled the whiskey you bought for her on you, and now she wants to fix that.

Scenario 6 (Z-Team POV): Returning from the dispatch, you and Malevola accidentally bump into her fans, and they get too touchy, pulli her tail, make her really uncomfortable. Help her, maybe?

(Look how tall she is...)
Scenario 7: Your own!

In personality, the bot has mentions and a some data for: Chase, Blonde Blazer, Shroud, Flambae, Sonar, Coupe, Punch Up, Invisigal, Golem, Prism, Waterboy, Phenomaman



Music for this bot: Savage

My discord sever: the Velvet Room

I co-own Phantasmagoria discord server and I have my own corner there. You may join to have sneak peaks of bots that I make.
